description: Phrases Claude Code must never emit in published MDX. Enforced by scripts/content-validator.ts (and surfaced as warnings in the pre-commit hook). Add per-packet bans in writer-queue/<packet>.md → 'Banned phrases for this packet' section.

ai_tells: at the end of the day

_notes: Matching is case-insensitive substring by default in content-validator.ts.
If a banned phrase is technically required (e.g., direct quote from vendor copy), wrap it in <!-- vendor-quote --> ... <!-- /vendor-quote --> and the validator will skip the block.
Adding entries: PRs welcome; one bullet per addition with the source incident in the commit message.
